title: Amtech S4460 3mm Tile Spacers for Accurate Tile Positioning, 400 Pieces, Grout Over for a Professional Finish
features: PERFECT TILE SPACING: These 3mm tile spacers provide regular gaps between tiles and are perfect for accurate tile positioning
LEAVE IN PLACE: They can be left in place and grouted over once all the tiles have been positioned
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description The Amtech tile spacer packs, simply help you to create a uniform and consistent gap between each tile during your DIY projects. Furthermore, you can also grout over each spacer for an all-round professional finish. The pack contains 400 spacers in total, and we also have 4mm tile spacers in the range, depending on your requirements. Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 400pc 3mm Tile Spacer See more
